nasb.text: “But as the time of the promise was approaching which God had assured to Abraham, the people increased and multiplied in Egypt,

esv.text: “But as the time of the promise drew near, which God had granted to Abraham, the people increased and multiplied in Egypt

cnv.text: “　神給亞伯拉罕的應許快要實現的時候，以色列人在埃及人口繁盛增多；

ccb.text: “上帝对亚伯拉罕所应许的日子快到的时侯，以色列人在埃及的人口已大大增加。

csbs.text: “随着神向亚伯拉罕所宣告的那应许时期临近，以色列子民在埃及兴旺、增多，
